query:
-- First check how many services have a phoneNumber that matches portal numbers
SELECT COUNT(*) as matchable
FROM phone_numbers pn
JOIN services s ON (
  s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND REPLACE(REPLACE(s.phoneNumber,' ',''),'-','') = pn.number
)
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus';
